notes: Wildcard show and ad configuration data. ability_templates provides the two-step roll UI: roll_wildcard_types() → roll_wildcard_abilities(type) → resolve_wildcard(name, type, ability). All effect magnitudes must stay within the caps defined in core/constants.py (WILDCARD_MAX_V_FLAT=80, WILDCARD_MAX_V_MULT=1.35, WILDCARD_MAX_INCOME=20, WILDCARD_MIN_UPKEEP=-4).

genre_options.label: Sitcom
genre_options.desc: A comedy series. Balanced cost and moderate base views.

genre_options.label: Drama
genre_options.desc: A prestige drama. Costs more, delivers more views.

genre_options.label: Sci-Fi
genre_options.desc: A science-fiction series. Strong base views and star synergy.

genre_options.label: Reality
genre_options.desc: A reality show. Cheapest option; relies on ad income.

genre_options.label: Sports
genre_options.desc: Live sports coverage. Highest views, highest cost.

genre_options.label: News
genre_options.desc: A news programme. Lower views but unique monopoly perk.

genre_options.label: Cooking
genre_options.desc: A food and cooking show. Steady income, strong ad synergy.
